tx.en: Your body reacts to exams, and that is normal

story.en: When you feel pressure, your body may sweat, feel dry mouth, or feel restless. This is energy, not danger.

tx.en: Slow breathing helps your body reset

inf.en: Calms the nervous system and reduces physical stress signals

q.en: What is the best reaction when your body feels nervous?

inf.en: Reduces stress amplification and improves control

story.en: Some students feel very active, others quiet, others need to move or adjust. All are normal responses.

tx.en: Slow steady breathing keeps your body balanced

inf.en: Helps regulate energy and nervous system activity

q.en: What is the best response to stress changes?

tx.en: Accept your body’s signals without fear

inf.en: Improves self-regulation and reduces anxiety loops

tx.en: Your attention can be trained back

story.en: During exams, your mind may want to escape. You can bring it back to the present task.

tx.en: One slow breath to reset focus

inf.en: Re-centers attention and reduces mental noise

q.en: What do you do when your mind drifts?

tx.en: Bring attention back again and again
Small actions can help your body feel safe

story.en: Drinking water, slow breathing, or taking a small pause can help reset your system.

tx.en: Breathe slowly and relax your shoulders

q.en: What helps you feel more stable?

op: Take a calm breath or sip water

tx.en: Give your body a moment to reset
Feeling weak does not mean you are weak

story.en: Sometimes your energy drops during exams. You can still continue step by step.

inf.en: Helps restore cognitive and physical balance

tx.en: One step at a time mindset

story.en: Your brain uses energy to think. Small pauses can restore clarity.

inf.en: Improves oxygen flow and mental clarity

q.en: What helps when you feel sleepy or tired?

tx.en: Allow your mind to refresh briefly
You are prepared more than you think

story.en: Everything you trained leads to this moment. Calm, focus, and one step at a time.

q.en: What is the strongest mindset now?

op: I will try step by step

tx.en: Trust your preparation and stay present

inf.en: Integrates confidence, calm, and focus under pressure
